IIITDM Kurnool – Admission, Cutoff, Fees & Placements 2026

Engineering Colleges, IIIT Colleges

Overview

Institute NameIndian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing, Kurnool
Also Known AsIIITDMKL
Institute TypeGovernment
Established2015
LocationKurnool, Andhra Pradesh

IIITDM Kurnool: Admission | Ranking | Fees

Also Known as

Also known as IIITD&M Kurnool, IIITDM Kurnool, IIIT Kurnool and IIITDMKL.

ADDRESS

Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing, Jagannatha Gattu Hill, Kurnool, Andhra Pradesh – 518007

Nearest Airport and Railway Station

Kurnool Airport
21.5 km
Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad
210 km
Kurnool City Railway Station
11 km

CAMPUS FACILITIES

RANKING

BodyCategoryRank (Year)
LatestPrevious
National Ranking
India Today Top Engineering Colleges57 (2025)64 (2024)

MODE OF ADMISSION

  • Candidates must appear for the JEE (Main) exam and either secure at least 75% marks (65% for SC/ST/PwD) in Class XII or be within the category-wise top 20 percentile in their respective Class XII board examination. For more details, refer to the JEE Main Performance Criteria in Class XII.
  • Admissions are based on the rank obtained in JEE (Main) through JoSAA Counselling and CSAB Special Round.

COURSES OFFERED

Please choose the course.

B.E./B.Tech. - 4 Years

  • Artificial Intelligence and Data Science
  • Computer Science and Engineering
  • Electronics and Communication Engineering with specialization in Design and Manufacturing
  • Mechanical Engineering with specialization in Design and Manufacturing

B.Tech + M.Tech. (Dual Degree) - 5 Years

  • Computer Science and Engineering
  • Electronics and Communication Engineering
  • Mechanical Engineering

FEE STRUCTURE

Institute Fee

ParticularsAmount
Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹4,000
One-Time Fees₹12,500
Tuition Fee (per Semester)₹80,000
Other Fees (per Semester)₹7,900
Total₹1,04,400

Hostel Fee

ParticularsAmount
Hostel Seat Rent (per Semester)₹3,500
Other Fees (per Semester)₹12,000
Mess Advance (per Semester)₹19,000
Total₹34,500

Fee Waivers

  • 100% Tuition Fee waiver for SC/ST/PwD students.

PLACEMENTS

  • 2024
  • Older

Highlights

  • Rs. 32.50 Lakhs per Annum offered to 1 student by Flipkart
  • Rs. 24.70 Lakhs per Annum offered to 1 student by Google
  • Rs. 23.40 Lakhs per Annum offered to 1 student by XCOM Labs
  • Rs. 13.00 Lakhs per Annum offered to 1 student by Infosys
  • Rs. 12.00 Lakhs per Annum offered to 1 student by HCL Tech
  • Rs. 10.00 Lakhs per Annum offered to 2 students by MAQ Software
